About Organization

National Testing Agency (NTA) is an Indian government agency that conducts entrance exams for higher education institutions in India.

NTA is responsible for conducting the National Eligibility Cum Entrance Test (NEET) for admission to undergraduate medical courses in India.

About the Programme

The National Eligibility Cum Entrance Test (NEET) is a national level exam for admission to undergraduate medical courses in India.

The exam is conducted by the National Testing Agency (NTA) and is a mandatory requirement for admission to MBBS and BDS courses in India.

CareerFlora Expert Insight

The National Eligibility Cum Entrance Test (NEET) is a highly competitive exam for admission to undergraduate medical courses in India.

To prepare for the exam, candidates should focus on building a strong foundation in Physics, Chemistry, and Biology, and practice with sample papers and mock tests.
